description.en: Returns anIDBRequestobject and, in a separate thread, creates astructured cloneof thevalue, and stores the cloned value in the object store. This is for updating existing records in an object store when the transaction's mode isreadwrite.

description.en: Returns the cursor's current effective primary key. If the cursor is currently being iterated or has iterated outside its range, this is set toundefined. The cursor's primary key can be any data type.
